NVIDIA strengthens critical infrastructure security with AI, collaborating with top OT providers to combat rising cyber threats.
news.summary: NVIDIA has collaborated with top OT providers to enhance security for critical infrastructure by utilizing AI technology. The partnership aims to combat the increasing cybersecurity risks in intricate environments. This move comes as a response to the rising challenges faced by these providers, with the integration of AI to strengthen their security measures.

Bloomberg reports on the performance of the consumer discretionary sector and industry.
SEC's crypto task force head Hester Peirce comments that meme coins may not fall under SEC's jurisdiction.
news.summary: Hester Peirce, who leads the SEC’s cryptocurrency task force, expressed during an interview that a large number of meme coins in the cryptocurrency market may fall outside the SEC's regulatory reach. The scrutiny came following meme coin launches by former President Donald Trump and First Lady Melania Trump. Peirce highlighted that these meme coins likely do not fall under the SEC's current regulatory framework. The commissioner indicated that the agency needs to assess each case individually. The news was reported on Benzinga.com.

137th Canton Fair holds promotions in Southeast Asia to boost trade and international exchanges, reaching Vietnam, Laos, and Cambodia.
news.summary: In Guangzhou, China, the 137th Canton Fair, known as China's top platform for global trade, recently concluded a successful Southeast Asia roadshow to promote international commerce. The roadshow included trade promotion activities held in Vietnam, Laos, and Cambodia in January. This year's fair, which attracted significant attention, is poised to enhance global trade relations and strengthen partnerships.

Gaotu Techedu to announce Q4 and FY 2024 financial results on Feb 26, 2025. Company is a tech education provider in China.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, Gaotu Techedu Inc. ("Gaotu" or the "Company"), listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol GOTU, a tech-focused education firm and provider of online large-class tutoring in China, shared plans to disclose its financial performance for the fourth quarter and fiscal year.

news.headline: XPOVIO® approved for public health insurance coverage in Taiwan, benefiting R/R MM patients; fifth APAC market to approve.
news.summary: XPOVIO®, the initial XPO1 inhibitor to receive approval in Taiwan, is now authorized for treating adult patients with relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma (R/R MM). In Taiwan, it becomes the fifth APAC market where XPOVIO® has gained approval, following China, South Korea, Australia, and Singapore. This marks a significant milestone as it expands the availability of this treatment option to more regions.

Kremlin: Putin and Trump discussed the energy sector.
Kremlin on Russian negotiator for talks on finding peace in Ukraine: when Putin makes a decision we will announce it.
Kremlin on possible Ukraine peace deal: There is a political will on both sides to engage in dialogue and search for a settlement
Kremlin: We are focused on preparing for a personal meeting with Trump

Global port and industrial tire market to hit $13.8 billion by 2031, growing at CAGR of 5.3%. Key players include Bridgestone, Michelin, and Continental. Industry driven by infrastructure expansion, automation, and demand for high-performance tires. advancements like intelligent tire systems and resilient tire technology aiding growth. Opportunities in smart tire tech, electric and autonomous port equipment, sustainable tire solutions, and R&D in tread patterns. Automation and advanced tech in material handling boosting market with AGVs, autonomous forklifts, and robots. Smart tire technologies like sensors and predictive maintenance tools also fueling market growth. Market report available on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: The global port and industrial tire market was valued at US$8.6 billion in 2022 and is expected to reach US$13.8 billion by 2031, with a CAGR of 5.3%. Key factors driving this growth include the expansion of port infrastructure, increased automation in material handling, and a rising demand for durable tires. Key players in the industry are focusing on technological innovations and strategic acquisitions. The market is essential for global trade and logistics, providing tires for equipment like forklifts and container handlers. Major industry players include Bridgestone, Continental, MICHELIN, and others. The market's growth is supported by the adoption of automation and advanced material-handling technologies, with a focus on smart tire technologies, electric and autonomous port equipment, sustainable tire solutions, and R&D in advanced tread patterns and materials. The integration of smart tire technologies such as sensors is also aiding market growth.

Scammers exploit fake transaction sites to trick victims with fabricated crypto deposits. Learn warning signs to stay safe.
news.summary: Certain websites are engaging in fraudulent practices by simulating fake transactions to deceive individuals. These sites create fictitious crypto deposits in order to scam unsuspecting victims. It is crucial to be aware of their tactics to prevent falling prey to such schemes. Pay attention to key signs such as unusual activity in your account, receiving unexpected deposits, and being asked to send funds before verifying the transaction. Stay vigilant and protect yourself from potential fraudulent activities in the crypto space. Remember, always verify the legitimacy of transactions and only engage with reputable sources.

news.headline: 30% of transactions in 2024 were tokenized by Mastercard, recognizing crypto's threat to conventional finance.
news.summary: In 2024, Mastercard successfully tokenized 30% of all transactions. The company recognizes stablecoins as a formidable competitor, recognizing the potential of cryptocurrencies to revolutionize the conventional financial sector.

news.headline: Coinbase plans to reenter India after exiting in 2023, as regulators ease stance on offshore crypto exchanges.
news.summary: The cryptocurrency exchange Coinbase is currently engaging in discussions with Indian regulators to reintroduce its services into the market following its exit in 2023. This move comes as the Financial Intelligence Unit (FIU) of India relaxes its position on offshore crypto exchanges. This potential comeback by Coinbase could revolutionize the crypto landscape in India, offering new opportunities for traders and investors.

The integration of blockchain has allowed AI agents to operate independently, enhancing their security measures. news.headline: Bitcoin whales increase exchange inflow nearing 5-year high, suggesting possible bull run comeback as patterns show.
news.summary: The price of Bitcoin has reached the highest levels of its cycle as large holders reduce their activity on exchanges. This trend suggests a similarity to previous patterns, pointing towards a potential recurrence in 2025.

news.headline: EFishery slashes around 90% of workforce amid looming liquidation.
Alwaleed Philanthropies launches Atlai 2.0, AI-driven climate intelligence platform to combat climate change globally.
news.summary: In Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, Alwaleed Philanthropies, lead by HRH Prince Alwaleed bin Talal AlSaud, has introduced Atlai 2.0, an upgraded AI-driven platform aimed at tackling environmental issues. This latest version includes enhanced features for tracking, documenting, and analyzing current data relating to climate change and environmental conservation efforts. Atlai 2.0 follows the success of its predecessor and marks a significant step forward in the organization's commitment to combatting these critical global challenges.

news.headline: Eutelsat and ATSS renew partnership for satellite services in Middle East and North Africa.
news.summary: Paris-based satellite operator Eutelsat has recently announced the renewal of its strategic partnership with ATSS. This partnership will continue to provide premium satellite services in the Middle East and North Africa region. The agreement aims to enhance connectivity and cater to the growing demand for satellite services in the area. Eutelsat and ATSS have been collaborating successfully to deliver high-quality services. This partnership renewal solidifies their commitment to serving customers in the region.

news.headline: Ageras acquires Storebuddy as its 7th company, following Shine in 2024 from Société Générale. Expanding in Denmark.
news.summary: In Copenhagen, Denmark on February 13, 2025, accounting platform Ageras acquired Danish payment reconciliation software Storebuddy, marking its seventh company acquisition. This follows its purchase of business banking provider Shine from Société Générale in 2024. This move aims to complement Ageras' services and expand its offerings.

Revving secures £107M investment to revolutionize adtech payment, boosting UK competitiveness.
news.summary: London-based fintech scale-up Revving has unveiled a groundbreaking investment of £107 million from DWS, one of the world’s largest asset managers. This investment includes £100 million in debt funding aimed at revolutionizing the UK adtech industry and broader digital economy. Through an innovative approach to invoice factoring, Revving seeks to enhance UK competitiveness in the global adtech market.

Xsolla partners with Day of the Devs in 2025, flagging support for new game dev. LOS ANGELES--Xsolla sponsors Day of the Devs.
news.summary: Xsolla, a prominent worldwide video game commerce company, has revealed their 2025 primary sponsorship for Day of the Devs, a non-profit group that honors the creativity, diversity, and enchantment of video games. This partnership signifies Xsolla's dedication to supporting game developers and uniting creative talents and opportunities globally. By sponsoring Day of the Devs, Xsolla aims to empower developers and create a positive impact on game development.

news.headline: Barco partners with Neat for seamless collaboration in meeting rooms - Neat Bar 2 and Pro now ClickShare certified.
news.summary: In KORTRIJK, Belgium and OSLO, Norway, Barco, a major player in meeting room technology, has announced a new partnership with Neat, a company specializing in user-friendly video devices. This collaboration aims to enhance the convenience and versatility of meeting rooms. In line with this partnership, the Neat Bar 2 and Neat Bar Pro devices have obtained ClickShare certification, ensuring seamless wireless conferencing experiences for users. ClickShare, a leading brand in wireless presentation and conferencing solutions, facilitates this integration.

news.headline: AI-driven cloud expansion in France faces challenge to balance cost reduction: ISG report. #AI #Cloud #France
news.summary: In France, enterprises are under pressure to enhance their cloud investments for AI integration while simultaneously reducing expenses, according to ISG. The drive to boost artificial intelligence adoption is prompting businesses to allocate more resources towards cloud technology. This dual challenge is prevalent within the French business sector.

news.headline: At MWC Barcelona, IOWN Global Forum to present network innovations at booth Stand 2B40 and discuss on March 4.
news.summary: In Barcelona, Spain, the Innovative Optical and Wireless Network Global Forum (IOWN Global Forum) will be sharing updates at MWC Barcelona about its advancements in creating a more efficient world through cutting-edge communication infrastructure. The Forum will be demonstrating its achievements at Hall 2, Stand 2B40 with exhibits and informational sessions. A special half-day session is scheduled for Tuesday, March 4 to delve into the impact of next-generation communications and infrastructure. This event will feature discussions on the Forum's initiatives and innovations.

news.headline: Ricardo to supply bespoke manual transmissions for Singer’s Type 964 Porsche 911, exclusive to Singer Classic Turbo and DLS Turbo restorations.
news.summary: LONDON--Ricardo, an international consulting firm, has recently agreed to provide custom manual transmissions to Singer's facilities in the United States and the United Kingdom. These specialized transmissions are unique to Singer and will first be offered to customers utilizing Singer's Classic Turbo or DLS Turbo restoration services for their Type 964 Porsche 911. Singer made a prominent entrance into the automotive industry in 2009 with their Classic services. This partnership marks a significant collaboration in the automotive sector and aims to cater to the discerning needs of owners seeking high-quality restoration services for their Porsche models.
